title: Mildly Mustardy American Narutomaki Noodles
description: A kid-friendly American dish featuring narutomaki, with a light and mildly mustardy flavor, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe is onion and garlic free, making it suitable for those with sensitivities.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the narutomaki to the skillet and saute for 2-3 minutes on each side, until lightly browned.
In a small bowl, whisk together the mild mustard and chicken broth.
Pour the mustard mixture over the narutomaki and stir to combine.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss to combine with the narutomaki and mustard sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
